caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with white text that includes "I DON'T REVEAL SHIT" sits in a room filled with framed photographs on the wall and a mannequin wearing a white shirt in the background. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone on a stand. Two logos are visible at the bottom of the scene: a circular black and red logo on the left and a red text logo that reads "REALLY" on the right. As the sequence progresses, the man is speaking, with his mouth opening and closing and his facial expression shifting slightly. He remains in the same position throughout, facing toward the left of the frame while continuing to talk into the microphone.
